cases.name: cody_stream_v8_text_first
cases.description: Cody stream v8, content=[text, image_url] (reverse order)

cases.name: cody_stream_v2_text_first

cases.name: cody_stream_v8_no_stream
cases.description: Cody stream endpoint with stream=false (non-SSE response)
cases.notes: Some forks accept stream=false on this endpoint; most do not.
